name: Honey Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Cook slowly, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches the hard ball stage (235°F/114°C on an oven-safe thermometer).
3. Remove from heat and pour onto a greased baking sheet or platter.
4. Allow to cool until it is safe to handle.
5. Once cooled, use your hands to shape the candy into desired forms.
6. Cut into 1-inch pieces when ready.
